narrative:
Twinsburg 1-C (precinct in Summit County) has 866 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.6 percentage points.
